subject: Chimecho, the wind chime Pokemon, soaring through a starlit sky
description: A small white and cream bell-shaped Pokemon floats joyfully through a vivid deep-blue night sky. A red tassel streams behind it and golden coin-like markings are visible on its form. The sky is alive with colorful shooting stars, arcing light trails in pink, yellow, and cyan, and a large golden star shape in the upper corner. Below, a lush green treeline grounds the scene. The overall composition is festive and ecstatic — a tiny creature adrift in a spectacular, luminous sky.
foreground: small white bell-shaped creature floating, red tassel streaming
background: deep blue-purple night sky with shooting stars and colorful light arcs, green treeline below
emotion: joyful and free, open-mouthed in delight while soaring
